Content:
[BANGKOK 🇹🇭] @siamyachtclub Siam Yacht Club – One of the most beautiful riverside restaurants in BANGKOK! 🌊🍷✨ 

An evening at Siam Yacht Club at Royal Orchid Sheraton Hotel located along Chao Phraya river is pure magic! 💫 With the ICONSIAM skyline twinkling across the river, we indulged in an exclusive dining package via @hungryhub_th - The Bar Package: 3 dishes + 8 cocktails OR 1 bottle of wine for 4 people at just ฿1,990! 🍷🍹 

What makes this experience special? HungryHub's exclusive packages unlock premium dining at unbeatable value, giving access to seamless reservation experience. 

As wine lovers, we had to go for the bottle of wine🥂, the perfect pairing for this dreamy riverside dinner. Plus, with live performances from Thursday to Sunday, the ambiance is on another level! 🎶✨ 

Here's what we enjoyed: 
🍤 Piri-Piri White Prawns – Juicy prawns with feta, wild rocket, and a spicy kick from chili oil & lemon. 
🍝 Green Curry Linguine with Wild Salmon – A bold fusion of green curry cream, ikura, anchovies Colatura, and green peas – bursting with flavor! 
🔥 Tom Yum Seafood Black Rigatoni – White prawns, baby squid, and salted cod roe tossed in a tom yum-infused foam sauce. 

For unmatched views, gourmet flavors, and exclusive perks, this is the spot! 🍷🌊

Content:
没来过 @copperbeyondbuffet , 就不算来过曼谷! Buffet业里的Fine Dine!❤️❤️

一间高端顶级Buffet, 无人不知晓的【Copper Beyond Buffet】! 这家是曼谷本地人甚至游客也爱去的Buffet餐厅, 水准远超过一般酒店Buffet, 不是只有浮夸, 而是真材实料, 道道精致!😋😋

Copper Beyond Buffet 主打的是“比酒店更有诚意”的自助餐! 每一道菜都讲究质感与摆盘, 而且味道完全对得起价格! 不是那种只是选项多, 而是每一样你吃下去都会觉得：“哇, 做得很好吃,!”

今晚吃的是Hungry Hub Pack A 2599Baht, 这个配套包括了其中一道Special Menu (Baked & Torched Canadian Lobster Tail with Trio Cheese Veloute; Khao-Soi Lobster Truffle Espuma or Korean Crab Paste D.I.Y) ! 
这个只有在Hungry Hub 预约与购买才有的哦！❤️❤️ 我们选着了Lobster Tail with Trio Cheese 和 Korean Crab ! 好吃😋

今晚really cincai 叫, cincai 吃, 毕竟第一次来, 有没有😂😂
没来的急做攻略, 但是ho, really beh pai, 每一样都色香味俱全！❤️😋

以下这几样都是a la carte 单点的, 要去到Ordering Counter 然后讲你的桌好, 然后讲你要点什么号码的食物,就搞定了！
食物然后会送来桌子😘😘
前菜: 
- Spanish Iberico Ham w Melon❤️❤️
- Crispy Homemade Tofu Foie Gras with White Truffle👍👍
- Hokkaido Scallop A La Plancha Cauliflower, Raisin Purée😋😋
- Cured Wet-aged Seabass, Grapes with Tomato Essence😍😍
- Argentinian Prawn Tartare, Green Pea and Wasabi Foam🥰
主食:
- Australian Striploin Steak (YYDS😘)
- Australian Wagyu Sushi ❤️❤️❤️
特别菜肴 : 
- Abalone Puff Pastry❤️
- Abalone Orzo Pasta❤️❤️

然后呢, 以下是在Serving Station 拿的: 
- Truffle Soup with Croissant ❤️
- Wagyu Prime Rib Marble 5/6❤️❤️
- Copper Smokey Pork Rib👍👍
- Sous Vibe Beef Tongue❤️❤️
- Australian Wagyu Beef Boat Noodle❤️❤️❤️
- Grilled River Prawns 😋😋
- Oyster 和 Sashimi 😘😘
甜也有单点, 也有在Serving Station❤️

感觉上, 好像只是吃了这里的菜单10% 而已, 下次再来盘🤭😂

整体环境高雅, 用餐氛围舒服, 食材补得快, 很多精致的食物都是即点即煮, 而且服务人员训练有素, 收盘, 送餐都非常快!❤️

重要提醒：Copper Beyond 是曼谷最容易爆满的Buffet之一，几乎每天都有人排长龙, 没有接受walk-in 的! 
通过 @hungryhub_th App 提前预订, 不只是方便, 用Hungry Hub Booking, 还可以选着特别菜单, 放心省时又专业 ❤️
还有记得做攻略, 一进如就立马去Order A La Carte 的menu, 另外一位战友也要去拿其他食物咯.. 不要等哦😂😂
晚餐是两个时段: 5pm-7pm / 7.30pm-9.30pm

Restaurant Name: Siam Yacht Club Royal Orchid Sheraton Riverside
Content:
February is a month with romantic vibe hence we took a plunge visiting the Land of Smile capital city - Bangkok & decided to dine at the @SiamYachtClub, facing the perpetual busy Chao Phraya River with stream of vessels plying, the main thoroughfare in Bangkok. With awesome view and perfect posh ambience at @SiamYachtClub, we decided to get the Outdoor Romantic Set – 4 Dishes + 1 Bottle of Sparkling Wine. 

All the dishes we had chosen were executed to perfection & I especially loved the Linguine, a fusion between Western culinary taste with local touch – using spicy yet silky smooth creamy green curry paste, served with sous-vide grilled salmon (very tender), ikura and ponzu sauce! Wifey said the grilled jumbo prawn was so succulent and meaty, and she simply loved it when added with house-made green chilli. Wulala! What made this a satisfied romantic dinner was we got this via @HungryHub_TH app with 30% off (2790 Baht or ~SG$110 instead of 4034 Baht or SG$160++)! 

This offer is valid till 10 May 2025! #DontSayBoJio

Restaurant Name: Copper Beyond Buffet Gaysorn Amarin (Hungry Hub)
Content:
🍽️ Hands down one of the most impressive buffet experiences I’ve had — where fine dining meets free flow. Booked the Hungry Hub Pack A (฿2,599/person) and got to enjoy an international buffet plus 1 premium dish.

Couldn’t resist and had both lobster dishes – the Baked & Torched Canadian Lobster Tail with Trio Cheese Velouté and the Khao-Soi Lobster with Truffle Espuma. Both were phenomenal and plated like à la carte dishes.

Beyond the indulgent seafood, the buffet lineup was next-level with fresh sashimi, wagyu boat noodles, and even truffle mushroom soup served with a croissant. Don’t skip the Thai Milk Tea – one of the best I’ve had in Bangkok.

Highly recommend booking early via Hungryhub to avoid disappointment!

An unforgettable dining experience at @lahnyaibkk 🔥

A Michelin-selected gem in Bangkok celebrating Thai royal cuisine with a modern twist. Their THB 3990++ tasting menu is a culinary journey inspired by centuries-old recipes once reserved for royalty, each dish thoughtfully crafted to balance tradition and innovation. 

We started with the Goong Saawn Glin, a flavourful combination of shrimp, pork fat, Som Saa, and pickled garlic, followed by the delightful Satay Lue, featuring a chili cracker and pork sausage with cashew nut sauce. Highlights included the aromatic Gaaeng Leuuang with squid and pomelo, the rich Gaaeng Rawaaeng curry with grey pomfret and truffle, and the indulgent Massaman Curry with 14-day aged duck and roti. 

Desserts stole the show with the refreshing Som Choon, featuring lychee, champagne granita, and fried shallots, and the creative Mee Krob, a blend of Thai tea ice cream, black tea mousse, and shrimp popcorn. 

Enjoy the wine pairing (THB 3500++), which elevated the experience, while the tea pairing (THB 2990++) brought a delicate balance. A true masterpiece of Thai gastronomy! Book now via HungryHub. 

📍Lahnyai Nusara
31 Suan Phlu 2 Alley, Mahamek
Sathon, Bangkok 10120, Thailand

Restaurant Name: Siam Yacht Club Royal Orchid Sheraton Riverside
Content:
A Luxurious Riverside Feast at Siam Yacht Club, Royal Orchid Sheraton 😎

Bangkok’s riverfront dining scene just hit a whole new level at Siam Yacht Club, where breathtaking Chao Phraya River views meet an unforgettable gastro-adventure. With a chic, nautical-inspired ambiance and an effortlessly sophisticated yet relaxed vibe, this is where you come to sip, savor, and soak in the city’s golden skyline. 

We indulged in a seafood lover’s paradise, starting with the succulent Gambero Rosso, crispy Seafood Tempura, and Jumbo Dutch Moules a la Creme—fresh, creamy, and oh-so-satisfying. The Black Rigatoni stole the show with its rich, umami-packed bite, while the Cheese Baked Oysters delivered pure decadence in every mouthful. 

For the meat lovers, the Smoked Sous Vide Beef Brisket was fall-apart tender, the Full Blood Westholme Wagyu melted like butter on the tongue, and the Grilled Japanese Kurobuta was smoky, juicy, and irresistible. Not forgetting the Charcoal Grilled Tiger Prawns, kissed by the flames for that perfect charred sweetness. 

With live music, impeccable service, and an electric atmosphere, Siam Yacht Club is a must-visit for those who crave elevated riverside dining with a touch of indulgence. 

Check out Hungry Hub for great deals and promos to enjoy a night out by the river.

Siam Yacht Club
📍 2 ถ. เจริญกรุง Siphya
Bang Rak, Bangkok 10500, Thailand

Restaurant Name: NAMA Japanese and Seafood Buffet (Hungry Hub)
Content:
[🇹🇭] @nama__buffet I had my eyes on this place since it first opened and booked through @hungryhub_th and chose the Premium Box 1 Set + Exclusive Menu + Buffet Line (Mon-Fri) ฿1,650/Person. 

The menu  can be ordered via QR Code. There are counters for fried food, desserts, drinks, and DIY rice that you can grab yourself. Honestly, just the DIY rice alone feels worth it because there are a lot of fresh ingredients to scoop from, such as shrimp, salmon, ikura, sweet egg, etc. 

Overall, everything is fresh. There are a lot of choices, especially the various sushi toppings. 
I couldn’t even finish half of the menu. 😅 

Recommended menus: - DIY rice - Beef fat fried rice - Salmon/scallops/shrimp marinated in fish sauce - Wagyu sushi - Various sushi toppings . Don’t  order too much, you’ll be full first. 

🇹🇭Address: 24th floor Centara Grand and Bangkok Convention Centre, 999/99 Rama I Rd, Khwaeng Pathum Wan, Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10330
☎️Phone: +66 061 269 2561

Restaurant Name: Siam Yacht Club Royal Orchid Sheraton Riverside
Content:
Experience the elegance of Siam Yacht Club, a chic riverside restaurant and bar at the Royal Orchid Sheraton Hotel in Bangkok. Located along the iconic Chao Phraya River, this vibrant hotspot features nautical-inspired decor and a menu that seamlessly blends Asian fusion with international flavors—a must-visit for food enthusiasts in the city.

Savor their standout dishes, including fresh seafood platters, premium steaks, and decadent desserts, all complemented by live music that adds a special touch to your dining experience. The outdoor seating area offers stunning river views, making it ideal for a romantic date night or a lively evening with friends.
Whether you’re drawn by the craft cocktails, the buzzing nightlife, or the picturesque riverfront setting, Siam Yacht Club promises a memorable culinary adventure. Open daily from 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM, it’s the perfect spot for your next Bangkok dining escape.

💰 I booked the Outdoor Romantic Set (4 dishes and x1 bottle of sparking wine)  via the Hungry Hub app for just ฿2790. 
✅ Snag this exclusive deal through the link in my bio.

🍴Hungry Hub × Kwann at Nysa Hotel, Bangkok

한국은 벌써 날씨가 추워졌네요! 다들 감기 조심하세요❤️
제거 이번에 방콕 출장 중 방문한 레스토랑들을 소개해볼게요!
첫 번째는 Nysa Hotel 내에 위치한 ’Kwann‘
은은한 조명과 조용한 음악, 그리고 향까지 완벽했던 공간이에요💫

이번 예약은 방콕에서 가장 많이 사용되는 미식 예약 플랫폼 헝그리허브를 통해 진행했는데요,
앱 안에서 메뉴 구성, 가격, 예약 가능 시간까지 모두 한눈에 확인할 수 있어서 여행 중에도 일정 조율이 정말 편했어요 :)

헝그리허브는  All You Can Eat (고정가 무제한 식사), Party Pack (셰어링 세트), Xperience (레스토랑 + 스테이케이션, 디너크루즈 등) 처럼 원하는 느낌과 예산에 맞춰 다양한 미식 패키지를 제공하는 게 특징이라 이동중에도 예약하기가 참 편하더라구요!ㅎㅎ

특히 가격이 명확하고, 예약 변경이나 요청사항 전달이 쉬워
여행 중 갑작스러운 일정 변경이 있을 때도 부담이 없었어요.
방콕을 자주 방문하는 분들이라면 모두 필수 추천드려요🤍

헝그리허브로 제가 예약한 메뉴는
✅Kwann Sharing Set for 2 People (฿2,590)
음료와 함께 콴 스타일의 오리와 5가지 메뉴를 즐기는 코스였어요.

웰컴 드링크의 향긋한 퍼포먼스로 시작해 다음 요리에 대한 기대를 힌껏 끌어올려줬어요.

1️⃣Kwann Style Roast Duck (Half) : 북경오리를 연상시키는 풍미
2️⃣Mala Beef Tartare : 부드러운 와규 타르타르와 훈제 노른자의 조화
3️⃣Cashew Nut Smoked Pork Belly : 훈제 삼겹살과 캐슈넛 카레, 수제 마늘 난의 밸런스
4️⃣Crab Beignet : 가볍게 훈제한 게와 남부 카레소스의 색다른 조합
5️⃣Kanom Mor Gaeng : 고소한 치즈케이크와 코코넛 크림의 부드러운 마무리

한 접시 한 접시마다 향과 온도가 섬세하게 조절되어 있었고,
전체적으로 태국의 향신과 모던한 감각이 잘 어우러진 코스였어요.

방콕에서 특별한 식사를 계획 중이라면,
헝그리허브 앱으로 예약해보세요.

Content:

방콕에서 꼭 가봐야 할 미식 명소, Copper Beyond Buffet.
150가지 이상의 요리를 셰프가 즉석에서 조리해주는
라이브 키친 스타일의 하이엔드 뷔페예요👨‍🍳

이번에도 예약은 Hungry Hub 앱으로 진행했어요.
메뉴 구성, 패키지, 예약 가능 시간까지 한눈에 확인 가능하고 프리미엄 메뉴 포함 여부도 명확해서 여행 중 이용하기 정말 편하답니다💛

제가 선택한 코스는
Pack A – Select 1 Premium Menu (฿2,599 per person),
프리미엄 메뉴로는 랍스터🦞❤️

신선한 해산물, 스시&사시미, 스테이크, 파스타, 태국 로컬 요리, 디저트까지 셰프들이 각 섹션에서 직접 요리하는 걸 눈앞에서 보고 주문할 수 있고 조리가 끝나면 테이블로 바로 직접 픽업도 가능하고 서빙도 해주세요.

방콕에서 제대로 된 한 끼를 원한다면,
헝그리허브 앱으로 Copper Beyond Buffet 예약 추천드려요.
맛과 경험, 두 가지를 동시에 채워주는 곳이에요✨ &

Restaurant Name: Spectrum Rooftop at Hyatt Regency Bangkok Sukhumvit
Content:
🍸 Hungry Hub × Spectrum Rooftop at Hyatt Regency

방콕에 왔다면 루프탑은 필수죠❤️
이번에 다녀온곳은 하얏트 리젠시의 스펙트럼 루프탑이에요.
29~30층에 걸쳐 라운지 & 다이닝, 루프탑 라운지가 이어지는 공간이에요.
해 질 무렵엔 노을이, 밤엔 도시의 불빛이 펼쳐져
그야말로 방콕의 매력이 그대로 담긴 장소였어요🇹🇭

이번에도 역시 예약은 헝그리허브 앱을 통해 진행했어요.
공식가 ฿3,435 → 앱 전용가 ฿1,999,
Sharing Set for 2 People 코스를 훨씬 합리적으로 즐길 수 있었어요💛

제가 선택한 구성은
🥩 Seafood & Grilled : Kurobuta Pork Chop
🍲 Antipasti, Soup & Dessert : Lobster Bisque, Carbonara
🍹 Drink : Non-alcohol Cocktail

파티팩 구성이라 메뉴 선택이 간편했고,
그중 제가 고른 조합이 생각보다 완벽했어요.
촉촉하게 구워진 폭찹, 깊고 진한 랍스터 비스크,
부드럽고 크리미한 까르보나라까지
서로의 풍미가 자연스럽게 어우러졌어요.

💡 Tip:
• 일몰 30분 전에 도착하면 하늘 색이 바뀌는 순간을 딱 볼 수 있어요 🌇
• 식사를 한 후에, 루프탑에서 공연을 보며 칵테일 한 잔 추천!
• 헝그리허브 앱에선 메뉴 구성, 시간대, 할인 정보까지 전부 확인 가능해서 정말 편했어요.

방콕에서 분위기 좋은 식사 + 루프탑 바 + 사진 찍기 좋은곳 을 
한 번에 즐기고 싶다면 추천드리며, 
헝그리허브로 꼭 리스트에 넣어두세요✨ &

🍴 Hungry Hub × Saneh Jaan

방콕 미슐랭 스타 레스토랑 중에서도 전통 태국 요리를 가장 정갈하고 아름답게 풀어낸 곳, Saneh Jaan
궁중 요리 기반의 정통 레시피를 현대적으로 재해석한 메뉴 구성과 프리젠테이션이 인상적인 파인 다이닝이에요✨

이번에도 예약은 헝그리허브 앱을 통해 진행했어요.
공식 가격보다 훨씬 합리적인 2인 런치 (฿2,190)를 이용했는데,
코스 구성부터 예약 시간, 메뉴 상세까지 앱에서 한눈에 확인 가능해서 편리했어요.

제가 선택한 코스 구성은 
🥗 Appetizer: Royal Thai Mixed Appetizers / Royal Thai High Tea
🍛 Main: Traditional Sweet & Sour Crispy Rice Vermicelli with River Prawn
🍮 Soup: Chicken Coconut Soup with Galangal and Lime

전반적으로 이곳의 요리들은, 세련된 플레이팅과 절제된 향신료 덕분에 태국 음식에 익숙하지 않아도 부담 없이 즐길 수 있어요. 새콤달콤한 소스와 향긋한 허브, 신선한 재료가 조화를 이루어, 참 괜찮은 현지 파인 다이닝이다 싶었어요.

💡 Tip:
• 센트럴 건물 위치해서 런치 이용시엔 근처 카페 가기 좋고 디너 시간대는 더 분위기 있어요 (조명 예술✨)
• 드레스코드가 있으니 깔끔한 복장 추천!(반바지 입고 가서 옷 갈아입으라고 주심😂 옷 이쁘죠?ㅎㅎ)
• 헝그리허브 앱에서 세트 구성과 할인율까지 미리 확인 가능

정통 태국의 맛을 가장 세련된 방식으로 경험해보고 싶다면, 헝그리허브로 Saneh jaan을 예약해보세요!🇹🇭✨ &

Mexican + Indian flavors = 🤩💥🌮💚🍤
•
At @mariaandsingh by Gaggan Anand, the menu tells the love story of a Mexican girl & an Indian boy: Ms. Maria & Mr. Singh 😉 along the way you are presented with some flavor packed and absolutely delicious dishes 😋❣️ 
•
pictured is the Scallop Ceviche, Prawns Royal Vepudu, Hate Squid Love Peanut Mole, Spinach and Paneer, & of course Gaggan’s Crab Curry 🦑🤩 I also recommend the Carnitas Tacos & the Mango Yuzu Snow Ball 🍧
•
📍 Ekkamai Soi 6

タイのレストラン予約アプリ「Hungry Hub @hungryhub 」限定で予約できる、90分フリーフロー付き5ディナーコース🍽
 
2022年9月に誕生日ディナーを食べてきました♪♪ロケーションも味もコスパも大満足で、とてもお勧めです😋✨
 
お店はロイヤルオーキッドシェラトン ホテル内にあるイタリアンレストラン「Giorgio’s」🇮🇹
 
赤・白・スパークリングワイン有りのフリーフローと、数あるメニューから好きな料理を5皿選べるコースディナーの大人2人セットメニューがなんと2,388THB NET😆💓VAT・サービスチャージ込みの値段なのも嬉しい🙏
※9月時点では1,990THBとさらにお得でした😭✨
 
いつも60THBのカオマンガイ食べて幸せに生きているけど、お誕生日とか記念日とかに、たまの贅沢をするのもまた幸せですな🥰
 
乾季到来で、オープンエアー🍃なお食事がますます楽しめる時期になってきたのでぜひ予約してみてください😆（室内のお席も選択出来るので雨の日も🆗！）

Their tasting menu (3990++ THB) is a journey through Thai 🇹🇭 royal cuisine with global twists—each dish tells a story of tradition, with flavours crafted from centuries-old recipes once enjoyed by kings 👑 . The wine pairing 🍷 (3500++ THB) elevated the experience, while the tea pairing 🫖 (2990++ THB) brought a delicate balance.

Restaurant Name: Giorgio's Riverside Royal Orchid Sheraton Hotel
Content:
วันนี้ตูนอยากชวนทุกคนออกไปลิ้มลองอาหารรสชาติเหนือระดับที่ห้องอาหาร Feast @ royal orchid sheraton กับโครงการ The Luxe of Taste โดยการท่องเที่ยวแห่งประเทศไทย โครงการนี้เค้ามี deal ! สุดพิเศษ ที่สามารถจองผ่านโปรจาก Hungry Hub ทานกันได้ยาวๆไปเลย ถึง 3 ชม ในราคาสุดพิเศษคนละ 1,483. - ต่อท่านเท่านั่น ! ( ราคาจะแตกต่างกันออกไป หากเป็น วันธรรมดา กับเสาร์อาทิตย์ค่ะ) 

  ร้านที่ตูนมาก็จะเป็นบุฟเฟ่ต์นานาชาติ Feast ห้องอาหารในโรงแรม Royal Orchid Sheraton Bangkok กันนี่เองทุกคน  ที่เพียบพร้อมไปด้วยวัตถุดิบชั้นเลิศ เช่น Lobster, Oyster และอาหารไทยชั้นนำ อย่างพวกแกงต่าง ๆ ก็คือมีครบมากก ถือว่าเป็นห้องอาหารที่ Must Taste ในย่านนี้ ส่วนโลเคชั่นไม่ต้องพูดถึงเลย จะบอกว่าโรงแรมเค้าตั้งอยู่ข้างๆ River City นี้เอง แหล่งรวบรวมศิลปะ และติดกับถนนเส้นตลาดน้อยที่เด็กฮิปสมัยนี้ เค้าชอบมาทำคอนเทนต์กันมากๆ 
  ส่วนตัวรู้สึกคุ้มมาก กับการมาทานบุฟเฟต์ครั้งนี้ เพราะนอกจากเค้ามีอาหารมากมาย หลากหลายเชื้อชาติทั้ง ไทย, ญี่ปุ่น, ฝรั่ง, อินเดีย รวมไปถึงยุโรป ให้เราได้เลือกทานแล้ว บางจานเรายังสามารถเลือกอาหารสด ๆ เช่น กุ้ง หรือกั้ง ให้เค้านำไปย่าง เผา ตามที่เราชอบได้เลย เรียกว่าถูกใจ สายอาหารทะเลอย่างเรามาก ๆ 
  ส่วนจาน สปาเกตตี คือเราเลือกได้ตั้งแต่เส้น ยันซอสเลยจ้า รวมถึงเครื่องที่อยู่ในนั่นได้หมดเลยค่ะ เค้าก็จะเสริฟมาพร้อมกับจานร้อน ๆ ทานฟินกันไปเลย 
  อะ ส่วนสายหวาน บอกเลยว่ามาคือ ไม่ผิดหวัง ของหวานเค้ามีครบ ตั้งแต่ขนมไทย เค้ก ทาร์ตไข่ และ ผลไม้สด โอ้ย แค่นี้ก็คือคุ้มมากแล้วสำหรับสายหวานอย่างเรา

  เชิญลิ้มรสประสบการณ์เหนือความคาดหมาย ของร้านอาหารไทยชั้นนำที่คัดสรรมาพิเศษ ตั้งแต่วันนี้ - 31 พฤษภาคม 2568

Content:
One of the most unique date spot in Bangkok. 

@siamyachtclub at the Royal Orchid Sheraton offers an unforgettable dining experience  where twinkling city lights meet the calm flow of the Chao Phraya.

 With stylish decor, soft music, and a front-row seat to the Iconsiam skyline, the vibe is effortlessly romantic.

We booked an exclusive deal through @hungryhub_th — champagne, mocktails, and a full-on feast for just 2,790 baht. 

An app that gets you amazing dining offers in Thailand. 

The food was indulgent, the music was chill, and the whole evening felt like a getaway without leaving Bangkok.

Skip the usual dinner spots - this place is a whole experience.

เทปันยากิเจ้าแรกๆในไทย พิกัดสีลม-ศาลาแดง #อาหารญี่ปุ่น #เทปันยากิ #สเต็ก

🕊️ ครั้งแรกในชีวิต มิ้มทาน "นกพิราบย่าง" แล้วชอบมากกก

ใครจะคิดว่าเมนูนี้จะอร่อยจนอยากเบิ้ลอีกคำ 🤍 หนังกรอบๆ เนื้อนุ่ม แบบที่ทานแล้วรู้เลยว่าเชฟตั้งใจทำสุดๆ

✨ ทั้งหมดนี้เกิดขึ้นที่ Purple Laurel ร้านอาหารจีนสุดหรูในเกสรอัมรินทร์ (ชั้น 3) บรรยากาศดีมากกก~ สีม่วงถ่ายรูปขึ้นทุกมุม ร้านตกแต่งสวย เป็นจีนร่วมสมัยที่อบอุ่นและมีเสน่ห์สุดๆ

📌 เมนูอื่นๆ ก็ไม่ธรรมดาเลยนะ: – ซี่โครงเนื้อออสเตรเลียตุ๋นเปรี้ยวหวาน สไตล์เจี๋ยงหนาน 🍖
– เยลลี่เชอรี่ซ่อนไส้ตับห่าน 🍒 สนุกในคำเดียว
– หมูสามชั้นพะโล้คู่หมั่นโถวกลิ่นใบเตย 🐷 ละลายในปาก
– บะหมี่ทะเลในซุปล็อบสเตอร์ 🍜 เข้มข้นถึงใจ
– ผักตามฤดูกาลผัดเกลือ
– ทับทิมทองเห็ดทรัฟเฟิล ที่หอมกลมกล่อมจนอยากยกนิ้วให้

💜 ทุกจานคือทั้งสวย ทั้งอร่อย เสิร์ฟมาแบบมีศิลปะสุดๆ ใครชอบอาหารจีนที่ล้ำกว่าเดิม ต้องลองเลย

"Bangkok Wonderland" บุฟเฟ่ต์ซีฟู้ดหลักร้อย วิวหลักล้าน! 🤩 ร้านลับในซอยเจริญนคร 39 ที่ไม่ได้มีดีแค่ซีฟู้ดสดๆ ส่งตรงจากเรือประมง แต่ยังยกขบวนอาหารนานาชาติกว่า 100 อย่าง พร้อมเครื่องดื่มรีฟิลและขนมหวานไม่อั้น! 🤤 ไฮไลต์เด็ด:  * บุฟเฟ่ต์ไม่จำกัดเวลา: อิ่มฟินตั้งแต่ 16:00-23:00 น.  * ไม่ต้องกลัวเปลืองแรง: น้องพนักงานย่าง/ลวก/นึ่ง เสิร์ฟให้ถึงโต๊ะ! 🍤  * วิวสุดปัง: นั่งชิลริมแม่น้ำเจ้าพระยา ฝั่งตรงข้ามเอเชียทีค ✨  * ราคาดีงาม: เพียง 625.- Net (จากปกติ 694.-) เมื่อจองผ่าน Hungry Hub!  * การันตีความสด: เจอของไม่สดคืนได้เลย ไม่มีค่าปรับ! 👍 เมนูห้ามพลาด: กุ้งแม่น้ำ, ปูม้าดาว, ปูดำ, หอยนางรม, แซลมอนดอง, ทะเลถัง, ปูผัดผงกะหรี่, ซูชิ-ซาชิมิ, ขาหมูเยอรมัน และอีกเพียบ! 🍣🍝 พิกัด: ท้ายซอยเจริญนคร 39 (มีที่จอดรถกว้างขวาง) เวลาเปิด: 16:00-23:00 น. ทุกวัน #BangkokWonderland #บุฟเฟ่ต์ซีฟู้ด #วิวหลักล้าน #HungryHub #รีวิวบุฟเฟ่ต์ #เจริญนคร #ของอร่อยบอกต่อ & ["bangkokwonderland","บุฟเฟ่ต์ซีฟู้ด","วิวหลักล้าน","hungryhub","รีวิวบุฟเฟ่ต์","เจริญนคร","ของอร่อยบอกต่อ"]

아직도 장롱 속에 있는지 한번 보실래요? 

젠지들이 우리가 한때@열광했던 카메라들을 좋아해서 리셀하고 비싼 값에 사들이는 중입니다😎 

개인적으로 코로나 이후 가장 많이 방문한 도시가 “방콕🇹🇭“ 인데요. 조금은 익숙해진 방콕을 디카에 담아보니 다시 방문하는 장소도 달리 보이더라구요. 요즘 카메라같은 쨍한 색감이 아니라 몽글몽글해지는 감성 한스푼 추가🫧 #캐논익서스 #oldcamera #ixus300hs #ixy30s #bangkok

Restaurant Name: Saffron Sky Garden Rooftop Banyan Tree Bangkok
Content:
If you’re in Bangkok and looking for great food, killer views, and a laid-back vibe, you seriously must check this out. 
I had such a fun evening at Saffron Sky Garden. The awesome rooftop bar & restaurant perched on the 52nd floor of Banyan Tree Bangkok 🌇 
With contemporary Thai cuisine, panoramic views of Bangkok’s glittering skyline, and the perfect breezy ambiance, this place is a true gem.
We explored one of their exclusive Sharing Set Packages, packed with vibrant Thai flavors and signature dishes that perfectly complement the view

Dinner sambil menikmati gemerlap kota Bangkok dari atas kapal mewah?

Saffron Cruise by Banyan Tree jawabannya!
Bayangkan: kamu duduk nyaman di atas kapal elegan yang berlayar di Sungai Chao Phraya, sambil menikmati hidangan autentik Thailand dengan sentuhan modern dari chef kelas dunia. Dari Pad Thai hingga Tom Yum dengan plating mewah, semuanya disajikan dengan suasana fine dining tak terlupakan.

Berangkat dari ICONSIAM Pier 2, kamu bisa merasakan pemandangan spektakuler: kuil-kuil bercahaya, istana megah, hingga skyline Bangkok yang memukau.

Cocok banget buat dinner romantis, perayaan spesial, atau sekadar ingin pengalaman kuliner yang beda dari biasanya.

- Scenic View langsung ke Chao Phraya

[SINGAPORE 🇸🇬] @shrimpprawnseafood – Riverside seafood feast at Boat Quay

Massive prawns, premium seafood combos, and refreshing river breeze, yes please!

We booked our Party Pack via @hungryhub_sg and it’s the best way to get value-packed seafood feasts for 2, 3, or 4 pax. Perfect for date nights or group hangouts.

Located right at Boat Quay, the ambiance is chill and scenic—city lights, river views, and SEAriously fresh seafood dishes that blew us away:

Here’s what we had in our party pack: 
🦐 Oozing Giant Scampi Prawns (2pcs) – Huge scampi loaded with chunky meat and coated in umami roe sauce.
🫕 Super Combo Vermicelli – Slipper lobster, Vannamei prawns & Korean clams in a one-pot seafood wonder!
🍳 Umami Prawn Omelette – Fluffy, wet-style omelette packed with prawny goodness.
🐟 Wild Seabass with Lime & Garlic – Thai-style seabass in a tangy lime-garlic sauce that slaps!
❄️ Snow Prawns (6pcs) – Chilled Vannamei prawns, clean, sweet, and so refreshing!

Book early via Hungry Hub to lock in your seats and unlock exclusive bundles!

#ShrimpPrawnSeafood #HungryHubSG #HungryHub #SingaporeEats #visitsingapore

We booked this weekday Yum Cha Lunch via @hungryhub_sg , only SGD 75 nett per pax and totally worth it.

We booked this exclusive 3-course experience via @hungryhub_sg for just SGD 76 nett per pax, and it comes with a FREE glass of prosecco. Cheers to that!🥂

Whether it’s date night or u catching up with your foodie crew, Hungry Hub makes it easy to dine well without the stress. Book now and treat yourself to an Italian feast worth craving.

[Singapore🇸🇬] @mizuya.sg | Special Omakase Lunch S$119 NET (via @hungryhub_sg)

Restaurant Name: Tea Lounge at Conrad Singapore Orchard
Thirteen BBQ Bar 十三烤吧
Content:
🔥🍢Thirteen BBQ Bar is a hidden gem in Singapore, boasting an impressive 4.8-star rating that is well-deserved. From the moment I stepped in, the lively atmosphere set the stage for an unforgettable dining experience. The menu features a tantalizing array of BBQ dishes, with skewers starting at just $1.20 each, making it a budget-friendly option for anyone craving authentic Chinese flavors.

The highlight of my visit was undoubtedly the BBQ skewers. Each one is expertly marinated and grilled to perfection, delivering a smoky flavor that evokes the essence of Chinese street food culture. I tried a variety of meats and vegetables, and each skewer was a delightful explosion of taste. We chose the mild spicy 微辣 version that was totally enjoyable and not too spicy.
Pairing the skewers with an ice-cold beer elevated the experience even further.

The spacious seating and group-friendly menu make it ideal for gatherings, whether with friends, family, or colleagues. If you’re a fan of Chinese BBQ skewers and looking for a casual dining experience, Thirteen BBQ Bar is a must-visit destination!

Indulge in an Exclusive 3-Course Italian Feast at $76 Nett! 🇮🇹✨

Savor the flavors of Italy with this exclusive 3-course set dinner from Hungry Hub, featuring handcrafted pasta, premium ingredients, and a complimentary welcome drink—with no GST, no service charge!

We kicked off our meal with a refreshing glass of NV San Martino Prosecco DOC, setting the perfect tone for the evening.

For starters, we enjoyed the Burratina, paired with Parma ham and aged balsamic, and the seafood-rich Frutti di Mare, a comforting bowl of clams, scallops, red snapper, and seafood broth.
For mains, we had the Smoked Rigatoni Cacio e Pepe, an elevated twist on the classic with charred rigatoni, Sarawak black pepper, and 24-month Parmigiano Reggiano, alongside the hearty Pappardelle, slow-cooked in a rich beef cheek sugo with red wine and parmigiano.

Dessert was a delightful finale—Torta di Mandorle, a delicate almond sablée topped with strawberries and vanilla chantilly, and the timeless Tiramisu, featuring espresso-soaked Savoiardi biscuits, amaretto, and eggnog mascarpone.

🎥✨ Calling all foodies! Join me on an unforgettable culinary adventure at Fook Kin in Singapore 🇸🇬—a must-visit spot for fans of mouth-watering Cantonese cuisine! 🏮🍴 This restaurant is renowned for its bold flavours and flawless execution, and trust me, it does not disappoint.

🔥 Highlights of the menu include the legendary crispy roast pork belly 🐖, with crackling so crispy it’s practically music to your ears, and their caramelised Cantonese-style BBQ pork 🥢, coated in a sticky, sweet-savoury glaze that’s utterly addictive. And don’t forget the Wasabi Ikura Prawns 🍤—juicy, tender prawns topped with briny salmon roe and just the right kick of wasabi for a flavour explosion in every bite. 🌟

✨ Situated only a short walk from the Somerset MRT station, Fook Kin combines traditional Cantonese flavours with a modern twist, making it a popular spot for both locals and visitors. Whether you’re a fan of classic Chinese dishes 🇨🇳 or love discovering exciting new food experiences, this place is a must-try!

Restaurant Name: Edge at Pan Pacific Hotel Singapore
Content:
Join me in feasting today at Edge with a deal of $73 per pax for our lunch buffet which you can get on @hungryhub_sg !

In making the perfect brunch at @edgerestaurantsg, got fresh fruits and made and assembled my very own charcuterie platter with Mortadella Ham & Paprika Lyoner. An imported selection of cheeses gets you spoilt for choice, add salads and pasta. 

Got pizza and soup with bread for a warmup. Ate my way through the roasts, paired with red wine sauce. Added on sausage, ribs, and healthier option spring vegetables and pan seared salmon.

Exotic Indian dishes include masala, dal and pakora, crispy snacks like papadam, garlic naan, and crowd favorites like butter chicken.

A formidable selection of local food includes freshly cooked laksa, DIY kueh pie tee and rojak, satay, delights like char kway teow, Nasi goreng, rendang, char siew and chicken, and a kacang putih snack bar too. 

Fresh and icy seafood like crayfish, scallops, even sea conch is placed along delicate Japanese sushi and sashimi, soba and udon mains with generous condiments of roe, kimchi and even katsu cutlet!

The highlight was seriously dessert. Get an insane dessert selection of pralines, waffles, ice cream, soft chocolates, tarts, cakes and desserts, pannacotta, tiramisu, crème brûlée! 

All set to a scenic view of the Singapore flyer and its surroundings. Get your special deal on Hungryhub now - don’t miss this.

Restaurant Name: Town Restaurant At The Fullerton Hotel Singapore
Content:
Dinner at Town Restaurant in Fullerton Hotel felt like a full journey through spice and flavor. Every dish carried its own kind of heat, from soft warmth to bold fire.

The evening started with smoky jalapeños and serrano chillies that opened the palate perfectly. Then came the Japanese Spicy Miso Ramen, spiked with Carolina Reaper for an extra kick. The St. Louis Pork Ribs stood out, coated in a thick Red Savina chilli glaze that balanced sweet and spicy beautifully.

Local favorites completed the experience. The Spicy Kueh Pie Tee had sambal that hit all the right notes, and Ayam Kuah Lada brought comfort through pepper and tradition. To cool down, Cardamom Coffee Tiramisu and Lemongrass Sorbet made a light, satisfying finish.

The reservation was made through Hungry Hub, the #1 dining offer app that started in Thailand and launched in Singapore in 2024. Booking was quick and easy, with the Spice Odyssey Dinner Buffet available at a 25% value package directly in the app.

Hungry Hub shows the total price upfront, with no hidden charges. Every restaurant package is curated for a premium experience, so it’s clear what’s included before dining. It also offers exclusive packages not available through walk-ins, covering top restaurants, hotels, and buffets across Asia.

For anyone planning a night out, booking through Hungry Hub keeps things simple, clear, and rewarding. It’s an effortless way to enjoy premium dining without surprises.

Restaurant Name: Tea Lounge at Conrad Singapore Orchard
Content: Weekend high tea buffet at Tea Lounge with a strong Peranakan twist. Calm space, steady flow of food, easy place to sit and take your time. Start with warm classic and corn scones with tomato jam, calamansi curd and clotted cream. Then move into savoury bites like Singapore chili crab rolls, pulled beef rendang sliders, sambal chicken charcoal buns and small tarts that keep the flavours light but still tasty. Live stations keep plates busy. Boston lobster popiah packed with turnip and grated egg. Rampah marinated beef striploin with vegetables and potatoes. Signature Singapore laksa built on a rich spiced stock with prawns, pulled chicken and quail eggs. Hot dishes feel homely. Banana leaf wrapped turmeric seabass, ayam satay with peanut sauce, ocean king prawn congee with pork meatball, otah curry puffs and crispy shrimp paste chicken wings. Easy to mix and match with tea or coffee. Dessert ends on a clean note. Pandan coconut mousse with gula melaka, black sesame éclair, pineapple calamansi verrine, Nonya kueh, fruits and a small gelato and sorbet corner. This whole weekend high tea buffet is booked through Hungry Hub at a fixed NETT price, with the package and menu set in advance. Booking through the app gives upfront pricing, an easy reservation process and access to value packed packages that are set up for a full meal, instead of ordering plate by plate as a walk in. Restaurant Name:
Apsara Cruise by Banyan Tree, 
Kwann at Nysa Hotel Bangkok,
NAMA Japanese and Seafood Buffet
Hook (First 5 Seconds): City of gourmet..when you are wondering what to eat in XXX (VO and text)

Content:
来曼谷必吃现在火红的NAMA Japanese Buffet! ❤️❤️
特别推荐给喜欢高品质日本料理的人,一个价格吃到饱！下次你来曼谷, 不只是按摩, 夜市, 道地美食, 也来一餐正统又豪华的日式Buffet, 也是行程亮点之一! ❤️❤️

来曼谷想吃一顿高质又不会爆预算的日式Buffet, 来这里就ngam 啦！位于市中心Central World酒店24楼, 地点方便, 食物水准高, 而且选项真的多, 最适合喜欢吃sashimi 的朋友! 😘

NAMA 的主打是他们家的刺身区, 新鲜三文鱼, 带子, 甜虾, 三文鱼卵都无限供应, 厚切, 口感刚好, 完全没有腥味! 尤其三文鱼切得厚厚的, 吃起来超满足! 喜欢吃 sashimi的朋友 confirm 会爱上！😋😋

今天吃上HungryHub 1650 baht 配套(Premium Box 1 Set + Exclusive Menu + Buffet Line), 重点premium box 包括了Otoro,Chutoro,Uni,Akami😍😍
这个只有在 @hungryhub_th 预约与购买才有的哦！❤️❤️

Premium Box Sashimi包括了 Otoro, Chutoro, Akami, Uni, Hotate, 甜虾, Salmon Belly, Salmon, Hamachi, Ikura 等高级食材
Exclusive Menu 包括了这四道special的: 三款tuna sushi ( Otoro, Chutoro 和Akami); 三款Foie Gras 寿司; Grilled 牛舌; 日本生蚝

除了以上的menu, 也大家也可以到buffet spread 里拿自己喜欢吃的, 应有尽有: 冰镇海鲜, 生蚝, salmon sashimi, 甜虾, Ikura, hotate ; Tempura 区的炸虾, 蔬菜; 甜品有日本哈密瓜, Croffle + Ice Cream, 北海道cream cheese catalana, 冰淇淋等

还没完哦！大家吃了可以吃到以上Special Menu, Premium Box, Buffet Spread 之外，还有其他的menu 可以order ! Scan 和 order 就可以了, sashimi, sushi, tepanyaki, 烤虾, Wagyu Beef, unagi 等好料！真的是不怕你来吃, 只怕你吃不完！😂😂

这个价钱可以吃到这样水准的 buffet, 是真的划算! 非常推荐！
HungryHub 不但可以直接订位, 还有特别菜单, 绝对值得先订好! 👍👍

整体来说，NAMA Japanese Buffet 不是噱头店, 是每一口都吃得出诚意的那种日料Buffet! 吉隆坡找没有这个价格的! 

@nama__buffet 
Centara Grand Central World , 24 楼
11am-10pm

Yeehaw! Saddle up for some good ol’ American feast @bernies.restaurant this long weekend!

With an inviting vibe at the restaurant & convenient location that is just right beside Springleaf Mrt, truly makes a great place to dine-in with your family & friends. It offers a wide variety of dishes, such as my favourite Burgers 🍔, Pasta 🍝, Steak 🥩, Sandwiches & many more. As well, a heaven for all the wine & beer lover!

So, what’s on our American Dream’s table ? 

<Starters>
🦪 Fresh oysters
🍤 Garlic Prawns

<Mains>
🍴 Salmon Steak 
🍴 Wagyu Steak

<Desserts>
🧇 Waffle with Berry Compote
🍰 Warm Banana Cake with Rocky Ice Cream

The oyster came so fresh & appetising, tempted to have more but trying to control myself. We also tried the garlic prawns which was cooked to perfection. Truly tasted delicious & savoury! Certainly a must try! 

Our main dishes were Salmon & Wagyu beef steak. We’re glad to select this dish because it tasted deliciously good. The salmon was well grilled & the Wagyu beef was truly tender, huge & great quality! 

Can’t forget a sweet treat to complete our meal! A waffle with berry compote is always a great choice after all the savoury bites! Beside that, we also tried out the Warm Banana Cake with Rocky Ice Cream, it was topped with caramel sauce, the homemade banana cake tasted so yummy, not overly sweet & pair it up with the ice cream, definitely tempted to have more but need to control. 

Currently, they’re having some amazing promotion & deals, so if you are looking for place to dine in with your family & friends, do drop by the place.

Mon~Sun: 1-for-1 Glass House Wine

Sizzle & Savor our Kbbq moment @wangdaebakkbbq 

Who’s ready for some delicious bbq grilled meats & banchan? We ordered the combo set that comes with 
Platter of beef meat
Platter of mix pork meat, 
Fried boneless chicken
DIY rice ball
Korean Pancake
Spicy Seafood Tofu Soup

Beer & Soju

The beef & pork are all fresh & tender. Each bite certainly melts in my mouth & packed with smoky goodness. Don’t miss out on the comforting, fiery bowl of spicy tofu food that warms you up from the inside out especially during this rainy day. That’s such a perfectly spiced & full of rich flavours. 

I thoroughly enjoy making my own rice ball & the reward was a delicious & umami flavor that perfectly complemented the bold BBQ meat. It’s so fun too! I highly recommended!

Don’t wait and gather your chingus or oppa for a delicious kbbq meal together.

‼️ every plate tells a story, where Latin soul meets Stanley street 💃 

📍 cudo | 13 stanley street, singapore 🇸🇬 | @cudo.sg 

cudo is more than just food. the ambience is warm and inviting, perfect for a date night or a night out with friends. 

service was spot on, cocktails were excellent (we loved the don negroni 🍸), and every dish felt like it had its own story. 

helmed by executive chef steven chou, every plate here is inspired by his memories of latin kitchens in new york and mexico city — soulful, fiery, and full of heart.

here’s what we feasted on:
1️⃣ cudo cado – guac reimagined with yuzu + chipotle, scooped up with crispy plantain chips 
2️⃣ warm crab queso – molten crab & cheese dip with sakura ebi 
3️⃣ torched truffadito – yellowtail kissed by flame & truffle tiger’s milk 
4️⃣ carnedilla – flour tortillas hugging 4h braised short ribs 
5️⃣ chipotle butter prawns – smoky, buttery, sweet with agave glaze 
6️⃣ cheese & jamón – creamy burrata + jamón serrano + arugula 
7️⃣ grilled seabass fillet – fresh with pineapple salsa & parsley lime sauce 
8️⃣ tomato rice – tomato-rich, hearty, the perfect side 
9️⃣ coconut tres leches – fluffy sponge soaked in coconut milk & rum 
🔟 toffee plantain – banana sponge + mousse + caramelised plantains 

🫶🏻specials worth noting:
💡 lunch course – $28++ for 2 courses, a perfect mid-day treat 🍴
💡 happy hour – mon–sat, 3pm–7pm: $8 beers, 1-for-1 cocktails, wines from $12 & $48++ freeflow for 2h 🍹🍷

cudo is the kind of place where food, stories, and people come together beautifully. latin soul, modern plates, and memories made around the table.

Spice up your life with some delicious biryani @semolina_sg 

For those who are craving authentic Indian cuisine, especially Biryani, make sure to try out Semolina. Not only do they offer delicious biryani, but also have a variety of menu options such as Dosa, Puri, Parathas, sandwiches & Semo Bowl in curry. Plus, they’ve vegan & vegetarian options available for those with dietary restrictions too. 

One thing that impresses me about them is that they crafted their sauce from scratch, using only the freshest ingredients. This shows their dedication to providing high-quality and flavourful food for customers. Definitely need to support them!

During our visit, we tried out 
-Mutton Biryani Bowl
-Protein Semo Bowl
-Chicken Masala 
-Pani Puri 
-Chicken 65
-Masala Chai tea 
-Semo Cold Coffee 

I totally impressed with the Mutton Biryani bowl. Unlike other places where the mutton can have a strong & unpleasant smell, this was cooked to perfection with a nice & succulent texture. The addition of the sauce elevated the flavour even more, making it a must-try! 

For a guilt-free & healthier option, we decided to try the protein semo bowl. it tasted delicious with the combination of chicken meat, broccoli & veg. Totally a perfect nutrition balance combination. Have this after gym or fitness! 

Absolutely love the Chicken Masala for its rich spice & savoury taste, as well the tenderness of chicken meat. Wow need to have this again! As for the Pani Puri, it’s my first time trying but I love the tangy & spicy taste of the fried potatoes. And lastly, the Chicken 65 is a mouth-watering appetizer, with crispy fried chicken pieces coated in an aromatic herb or spicy garnishes! Such a delightful dish to try it out!
